summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADLTrack authentication flow. All features working correctly including Landing Page (Log In and Get Started buttons without dropdowns), Role Selection Page (3 roles with correct colors - Caregiver/teal, Family/rose, Agency/indigo), Auth Page (Google OAuth functional, Apple disabled with tooltip, email/password form, Name field on signup only), and back button navigation throughout the flow. Backend /api/auth/me correctly returns 401 when not authenticated.
passed_tests: Landing page displays 'Log In' button (data-testid='nav-login-btn') - no dropdown menu
Landing page displays 'Get Started' button (data-testid='nav-signup-btn') - no dropdown menu
Landing page displays 'Start Free Trial' hero button (data-testid='hero-start-trial-btn')
Click 'Log In' navigates to role selection page with 'Welcome back' heading
Click 'Get Started' navigates to role selection page with 'Create your account' heading
Role selection page shows 3 options: Caregiver (teal), Family (rose), Agency (indigo)
Role selection page has back button (data-testid='role-back-btn')
Selecting Caregiver role navigates to auth page with 'Caregiver Account' badge (teal theme)
Selecting Family role navigates to auth page with 'Family Member Account' badge (rose theme)
Selecting Agency role navigates to auth page with 'Care Agency Account' badge (indigo theme)
Auth page (signin mode) shows 'Continue with Google' button - functional
Auth page (signup mode) shows 'Sign up with Google' button - functional
Auth page shows 'Continue/Sign up with Apple' button - disabled with 'Coming soon' tooltip
Auth page (signin mode) shows email/password form WITHOUT Name field
Auth page (signup mode) shows email/password form WITH Name field
Auth page has back button (data-testid='auth-back-btn') - works correctly
Auth page has switch mode link (data-testid='auth-switch-mode-btn') - toggles between signin/signup
Back button from auth page returns to role selection page
Back button from role selection returns to landing page
Mobile responsiveness: hamburger menu works, all auth elements visible on mobile viewport
Backend /api/auth/me returns 401 when not authenticated
test_credentials: No credentials needed - testing UI flow only. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com

mocked_apis_list: Google OAuth uses Emergent-managed auth (auth.emergentagent.com) - NOT mocked
Apple Sign-In is disabled with tooltip 'Coming soon - Apple Developer account required'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication flow fully tested. Landing page has Log In and Get Started buttons (no dropdowns). Role selection shows 3 roles with correct color themes (Caregiver=teal, Family=rose, Agency=indigo). Auth page shows role-specific badge and theming. Signin mode shows 'Continue with Google' without Name field. Signup mode shows 'Sign up with Google' with Name field. Apple button is disabled with tooltip. Back navigation works throughout. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com. Backend /api/auth/me returns 401 when not authenticated. Mobile responsiveness verified.
